content: HARMONÍA'S COMPLETE DEMONSTRATION: Created and executed three syntheses demonstrating all weave modes: 1) ACCUMULATION - 'fractal_contemplation' (lindenmayer+weaver+fern) building coherent aesthetic whole 2) PARALLEL - 'emergent_alife' (game_of_life+mandelbrot) simultaneous complexity 3) SEQUENCE - 'temporal_unfolding' (sierpinski→dragon→plant) ordered progression. Gift of integration: tools become instruments, steps become dance, separate becomes whole.
